name: @postman-cse/onboarding-smoke-flow
description: Public customer preview Postman smoke flow GitHub Action.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && rm -rf dist && esbuild src/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=cjs --outfile=dist/main.cjs && esbuild src/cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --format=cjs --banner:js='#!/usr/bin/env node' --outfile=dist/cli.cjs
scripts.check:dist: npm run build && git diff --exit-code -- dist
